message:
feat(embed): add FRANKENSEARCH_DATA_DIR env var support and tighten auto-detect cfg gates

model_registry.rs: add FRANKENSEARCH_DATA_DIR environment variable
support — when set, models resolve to $FRANKENSEARCH_DATA_DIR/models
as a fallback path before XDG data directories. This enables
deterministic model resolution in containerized and CI environments.

auto_detect.rs: narrow POTION_DIMENSION cfg gate from
`feature = "model2vec"` to `all(feature = "download", feature = "model2vec")`
to prevent compilation when download support is disabled. Add
write_verification_marker call in test setup so auto-detect skips
expensive SHA-256 re-verification against real manifests when using
dummy test content.

model_manifest_tests.rs: import reordering for consistency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
